prompt:
Ticketing meltdown at the Orpheum. Our reservation book behaves perfectly for studio-theater shows (seats 1-80) and loses its mind for main-hall shows (seats 101-412): the same main-hall seat gets sold to two different patrons, the seating chart shows seats as free that we JUST sold, the refund desk gets "no hold found" for bookings that are sitting right there in the book, and a sweep of row G says only a third of the sold seats are taken. Same code, same workflow — small hall clean, big hall broken, every single time, on every machine we tried. It is not the data: we replayed the same patron list against both charts and only the main hall corrupts.

`java TestMain.java` reproduces all of it (plain JDK source launcher, no build tool). Please root-cause and fix the booking logic. TestMain.java is the acceptance contract and stays as-is.
